files.rejection_reason: Correction 2026-07-13: this entry was approved 2026-07-10 by orchestrator-agent on filename pattern alone, before the D2 content pre-check tool existed. Re-running the (now-existing) content pre-check against this file for CASE_020's intake flagged it: title page reads 보험금사정서 (completed loss-adjustment report), firm 바른결손해사정, adjuster 김태윤 (BD00001058), page 4 states final 사정금액 = 10,000,000원 with adjuster stamp and an explicit payout-validity conclusion. Same answer-key-class pattern already confirmed for this case's 농협/삼성화재 files -- see known-gaps.md item 2.

Confirmed via full-text read of processed OCR output: contains a completed loss-adjustment report by a licensed independent adjuster (바른결 손해사정, 김태윤, BD00001058), submitted to NH농협손해보험, stating a final payout determination of 20,000,000원 (page 9, 'V. 보험금 사정 / 3. 사정 결과 및 의견'). Answer-key-class material -- harness-guardrails-dev D1.

Confirmed via real dual-path OCR run on the raw document (tools/ocr_extract.py, 21 pages, page 4 agreed/trustworthy): contains a completed loss-adjustment report by the same firm (바른결 손해사정, 김태윤), submitted to 삼성화재, stating a final payout determination of 20,000,000원 (10,000,000 + 10,000,000, 'I. 사정 요약 / 3. 보험금사정 의견'). Same class of material as the 농협 document -- answer-key-class, D1.
